name: Exposure Directness appraisal for tad-cognition-healthy-adults bundle
summary: Accepted. The bundle distinguishes single-dose tadalafil 20 mg, tadalafil 20 mg daily for 3 months, and non-tadalafil vardenafil 10-20 mg. The claim does not treat vardenafil as direct tadalafil evidence and does not generalize acute or higher-dose disease-population exposure to low-dose daily use in healthy adults.

findings.claim_or_issue: No staged source tests common low-dose daily tadalafil regimens for cognition in healthy adults.
findings.why_it_matters: Dose and duration materially affect off-label interpretation and safety framing.
findings.recommended_action: Keep low-dose daily healthy-adult cognition in unknown_or_unreviewed_contexts unless direct evidence is added.
